MOTION TO STRIKE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES PORTIONS OF SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT - AMENDED FILED ON AUGUST 14, 2006, OLD HEARING DATE SEPTEMBER 06, 2006 FILED BY DEFENDANT LIM, STANLEY LIM, YAN HEARING SET FOR SEP-29-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS STANLEY LIM AND YAN LIM'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS AN AMENDED MOTION WAS FILED ON AUGUST 18, 2006. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
REPLY (CONSOLIDATED) TO PLTF NANCY FELLOWS' OPPOS TO DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LIM, STANLEY LIM, YAN

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS STANLEY LIM AND YAN LIM'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO THE 4TH, 8TH, 9TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CAUSES OF ACTION 4 AND 8, SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH TO PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4. WITH RESPECT TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8, SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD 3RD PARTY RELATIONSHIP WITH WHICH DEFENDANTS INTERFERED AND HOW THEY DID SO. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 9 AND 10. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB/JF) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS STANLEY LIM AND YAN LIM'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO ALLEGATIONS CONCERNING THE GENERAL PUBLIC, BUT OTHERWISE DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Steven J. McDonald of Greenstein & McDonald, 773-1240, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Stanley Lim and Yan Lim's Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiff's Second Amended Complaint is granted as to allegations concerning the general public, but otherwise denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

AMENDED DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul A. Kanter of the Law Offices of Mark R. Mittelman, 925-256-0679, appearing for defendants and moving parties
Steven J. McDonald of Greenstein & McDonald, 773-1240, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Defendants Stanley Lim and Yan Lim's Amended Demurrer to the 4th, 8th, 9th and 10th Causes of Action of the 2nd Amended Complaint was argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Causes of action 4 and 8, sustained with 10 days leave to amend if plaintiff can do so in good faith to plead outrageous conduct as to cause of action 4.
With respect to Cause of Action 8, sustained with 10 days leave to amend to plead 3rd party relationship with which defendants interfered and how they did so.
Overruled as to causes of action 9 and 10.
Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
